channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Elon Musk and America’s Far Right Stoke Anger Over Murder of UK Teen
item.description: Influential figures, including Nick Fuentes, have been accused of “hijacking” the murder of Henry Nowak to push a racist agenda.

item.title: Uber lance ses robotaxis dans un autre pays européen fin 2026
item.description: Uber et le chinois WeRide vont lancer les premiers robotaxis commerciaux d'Espagne à Madrid avant la fin 2026. Mais derrière l'annonce, il y aura un humain au volant.

item.title: Amazon Employees Show Up to City Council Meeting to Demand Limits on Data Centers
item.description: Activists say it’s the first time Big Tech employees have publicly called for regulations governing data center projects.

item.title: La preuve la plus solide à ce jour d’un bouclier magnétique autour d’exoplanètes
item.description: Les planétologues savent que le champ magnétique terrestre influence notre atmosphère de manière complexe. On pense qu'il pourrait parfois constituer un élément clé pour rendre des exoplanètes habitables. Mais sommes-nous certains qu'elles peuvent parfois posséder des champs magnétiques, au...

item.title: The Humanoid Robot of the Future Is a 6-Foot-Tall Beefcake With a Chinese Body and an American Brain
item.description: Spencer Huang, Nvidia’s robotics lead, tells WIRED that the new bot combines the best of both worlds.

item.title: The best Qi2 batteries for iPhone and Pixel
item.description: Compact power banks have gotten a lot faster in the past year — and it’s not just their USB-C charging speeds that have received a boost. The newest Qi2.2-certified models can wirelessly charge an iPhone 16 or later at up to 25W. Combine that with their ability to magnetically snap on via MagSafe, and you’ve […]

item.title: Outlander: Blood of My Blood season 2 — release date, cast and everything we know so far about the hit Starz and MGM+ spinoff show's return
item.description: Thankfully, Outlander: Blood of My Blood season 2 was renewed before season 1 had even started airing. Here's the latest on the hit Starz spinoff show's return.

item.title: 'A new category of agents': Microsoft reveals Scout, its first "Autopilot", which wants to change how you work for good
item.description: Microsoft unveils Autopilots, a new kind of AI agents, with Scout promising improved productivity and efficiency.

item.title: VR exercise platform Supernatural is getting a second chance as an independent company
item.description: A new Supernatural VR workout app arrives this fall months before Meta planned to shut it down.

item.title: OpenAI and Anthropic are battling to conquer the AI market in Finance and Legal
item.description: OpenAI and Anthropic are battling it out to win over new and converted customers from these two sectors.

item.title: As AI gets better, it reveals an empty promise
item.description: This week we've got tandem hands-ons with Google's new Gemini AI agent - Spark - from my colleagues David Pierce and Jay Peters. Their takeaways are similar: It's so effective that it's scary. Spark knew that David's dog is named Frida and knew the first name of Jay's wife, even though neither of them explicitly […]

item.title: WWDC 2026 could be Apple's most important event in years, and it doesn't just hinge on Siri — here are 3 ways it can (and should) deliver
item.description: We know how Apple's WWDC keynote usually goes, but Apple can't afford to treat this edition as business as usual. Here are some suggestions for Apple to shake up the format and make a memorable event.

item.title: Is GoPro the next Kodak? AI could bring down the action cam pioneer as filings raise ‘substantial doubt’ about its future
item.description: Due to slim profit margins and fast-rising memory prices, action camera giant GoPro may have some difficult financial decisions to make very soon.

item.title: The Oura Ring 4 is a 'future-proof smart ring' — and it just dropped to its cheapest price yet ahead of Prime Day
item.description: The Oura Ring 4 is a 'future-proof smart ring,' and it's now on sale for a record-low price of $399 ahead of Prime Day.

item.title: Ultrahuman says hackers accessed customers’ wellness data via internal tool
item.description: The breach at wearable ring maker Ultrahuman stemmed from credentials stolen from a malware-infected employee laptop.

item.title: The final trailer for 2026's Supergirl movie is here to remind you why its Woman of Tomorrow subtitle was dropped from the DC comic book movie
item.description: DC Studios has released one final Supergirl trailer ahead of its June 26 release date.

item.title: Carvana ties up with Bezos-backed Slate Auto as it plans new car sales
item.description: Carvana was granted a warrant to buy shares in Slate last year, according to documents obtained by TechCrunch. Guggenheim Partners CEO Mark Walter is heavily invested in both companies.

item.title: Gemma 4 12B : comment installer l’IA open source de Google sur votre PC ou Mac
item.description: Le petit dernier de Gemma 4, la famille de modèles d'IA open source de Google qui tourne sur votre propre PC ou Mac sans cloud ni abonnement, c'est le 12B. Et c'est sans doute le plus malin de la bande pour un ordinateur portable. On vous explique comment l'installer et ce que ça vaut vraiment.

item.title: I'm a tablet expert, and iPads are still miles better than Android slates for multitasking — but Apple will lose the advantage if it doesn't fix the rest of iPadOS soon
item.description: Apple's iPadOS software continues to make multitasking a breeze compared to Android tablets, but there's room for improvement on all sides.

item.title: This is the VPN I'd give to my gran to keep her banking safe and her online Scrabble secure — everything's explained, everything's private, and it's cheaper than NordVPN right now
item.description: I've tested VPNs for years, and this is the one that's simple enough to give to anyone. Right now it's even cheaper than the best VPN there is.

item.title: The European Union reveals details of its tech sovereignty package
item.description: New proposals will see the EU further invest in European startups and companies as it looks to strengthen its homegrown tech footprint.
